Container.Name: Pantria

Branch.TagDescription: Tracking the latest green CI build.

Container.Overview:
Pantria — household ERP for food storage, multi-store grocery prices, and receipt OCR. Rails 8 + MySQL + Solid Queue. The image bundles Puma (web), Solid Queue (background jobs) and OCR tooling in one process so a single Unraid container runs the whole app.
BEFORE INSTALLING: 1. Provision a MySQL 8.4+ container (the official `mysql:8.4` image works, or `linuxserver/mariadb`). Create a database (default name `pantria_production`) and a user that owns it. 2. Mint a SECRET_KEY_BASE (`docker run --rm ruby:3.3 ruby -rsecurerandom -e 'puts SecureRandom.hex(64)'`) OR copy the project's `config/master.key` value into RAILS_MASTER_KEY. 3. Put a reverse proxy (SWAG, Traefik, Nginx Proxy Manager) in front -- the app sets `force_ssl=true` so it expects to be terminated over HTTPS. Point the proxy at this container's host:port and set APP_HOST to the public hostname it serves.
First boot runs `rails db:prepare` automatically (creates schema + runs seeds on an empty database), so an empty pantria_production DB is fine.
Container.Requires: An external MySQL 8.4+ container and a reverse proxy that terminates HTTPS.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Container port Puma listens on. Map to whatever host port your reverse proxy points at.

Config.Name: Active Storage
Config.Description: Receipt images and other ActiveStorage blobs. Persist this -- losing it means losing every uploaded receipt.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Optional. Mount a directory containing credentials.yml.enc and the matching master.key if you don't want to pass RAILS_MASTER_KEY as an env var.

Config.Name: DATABASE_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname (or container name on the same Docker network) of the MySQL server.

Config.Name: DATABASE_PORT
Config.Description: MySQL port.

Config.Name: DATABASE_NAME
Config.Description: Database name. `rails db:prepare` will create the schema on first boot if the DB itself exists.

Config.Name: DATABASE_USERNAME
Config.Description: MySQL user that owns the Pantria database.

Config.Name: DATABASE_PASSWORD
Config.Description: MySQL password for the user above.

Config.Name: APP_HOST
Config.Description: Public hostname the app is served as. Required -- Rails' DNS-rebinding guard rejects anything else, and email/Active Storage links use it.

Config.Name: RAILS_MASTER_KEY
Config.Description: Contents of config/master.key (32 hex chars). Required for decrypting credentials.yml.enc. Alternatively, mount the master.key file via the 'Config' path above and leave this empty.

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY_BASE
Config.Description: Optional. Falls back to credentials if unset. Generate with `ruby -rsecurerandom -e 'puts SecureRandom.hex(64)'`.

Config.Name: SOLID_QUEUE_DISABLE
Config.Description: Solid Queue (background workers + recurring schedule) starts alongside Puma by default in this container. Set to '1' only if you run a dedicated worker container against the same DB.

Config.Name: OCR_THREAD_LIMIT
Config.Description: Cap on cores tesseract may use per receipt scan (OMP_THREAD_LIMIT). Default 2 stops a single OCR job from pinning every CPU on the host. Bump on a beefy box; drop to 1 on a small one.

Config.Name: RAILS_LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: One of: debug, info, warn, error, fatal. Stay on info unless you're chasing a bug -- debug is very chatty.

Config.Name: RAILS_MAX_THREADS
Config.Description: Puma threads per worker AND ActiveRecord pool size. Bump together if you raise WEB_CONCURRENCY.

Config.Name: WEB_CONCURRENCY
Config.Description: Puma worker processes (clustered mode). Leave empty for single-process mode -- safer for low-traffic homelab use. Set to 2-4 only if you have CPU headroom.

Config.Name: SMTP_ADDRESS
Config.Description: SMTP host for outbound email (password resets, activation). Leave empty to disable email.

Config.Name: SMTP_PORT
Config.Description: SMTP port (usually 587 for STARTTLS, 465 for implicit TLS).

Config.Name: SMTP_USERNAME
Config.Description: SMTP auth user.

Config.Name: SMTP_PASSWORD
Config.Description: SMTP auth password.

Config.Name: SMTP_DOMAIN
Config.Description: HELO domain (typically same as APP_HOST). Defaults to APP_HOST if unset.

Config.Name: SMTP_STARTTLS
Config.Description: Set to 'false' for implicit-TLS (port 465) or unencrypted SMTP.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Container timezone. Affects log timestamps and scheduled-job firing times.

Config.Name: FLASCHENPOST_MAX_PRODUCTS
Config.Description: Hard cap on how many sitemap entries the daily Flaschenpost sync resolves into product IDs (applies across all households). Each household sets its own Flaschenpost warehouse ID via Settings -> Household.
